testcase.name: Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(a) · LevelBadgeRow · profile.level=L2 active 高亮(D-237)
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(b) · 4 指标真数据 · feedbackCountGood=6 / needsImprovement=2 / deepLearning=3 / satisfactionRate=0.75
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(c) · 触发进化 button → evolve.mutate(rateableType=manual_trigger)
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(d) · 生成洞察 button · feedbackCountTotal<5 → disabled + title=需 ≥ 5 反馈
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(d2) · 生成洞察 button · feedbackCountTotal>=5 → enabled
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(e) · 进化洞察模块 · latestInsight summary 渲染
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(e2) · 进化洞察模块 · null latestInsight → 暂无洞察 D-237 字面锁
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(f) · 进化方向 · profile.currentDirection=创意性优先 → 初始 selected
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-10(f2) · 进化方向 change → updateConfig.mutate({currentDirection})
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-1 · null profile → EmptyState 新用户 · 暂无进化数据
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-1 · isLoading → Loader2 spinner visible
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > H1 · 智能体进化中心
Evolution page · PRD-25 US-004 > AC-7 · 新增学习 button → toast.info 正确文案
